last_interaction.instruction: Inspect the current page without changing it. Return strict JSON only with this shape: {"authenticated": boolean, "current_url": string, "page_title": string, "on_login_page": boolean, "summary": string}. Set authenticated to true only if the current page is inside the logged-in app and no login form is blocking access.
last_interaction.output:
```json
{
  "authenticated": false,
  "current_url": "https://webapp.spypoint.com/login",
  "page_title": "Login - Spypoint",
  "on_login_page": true,
  "summary": "The current page is the login page for Spypoint. It contains a sign-in form with fields for email and password, and a login button. The user is not authenticated."
}
```
